sentences.target: Je recueille des avis pour le sondage.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁə.kœj dez a.vi puʁ lə sɔ̃.daʒ/

translations.fr: Je recueille des avis pour le sondage.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁə.kœj dez a.vi puʁ lə sɔ̃.daʒ/
translations.en: I'm gathering feedback for the survey.
translations.es: Estoy recopilando opiniones para la encuesta.
translations.de: Ich sammle Rückmeldungen für die Umfrage.
translations.it: Sto raccogliendo pareri per il sondaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为这份调查收集意见。
translations.yue: 我而家為呢份問卷收集意見。
translations.pt: Estou coletando opiniões para a pesquisa.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thu thập ý kiến cho khảo sát.
translations.nl: Ik verzamel feedback voor de enquête.
translations.hi: मैं सर्वे के लिए प्रतिक्रिया एकत्र कर रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Saya sedang mengumpulkan masukan untuk survei.
translations.sv: Jag samlar in synpunkter till undersökningen.
translations.ja: アンケートのために意見を集めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; agrees with the verb.
Main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; denotes the action of gathering/collecting.
Indefinite plural article (de + les); introduces a plural noun.
Common noun, masculine; here plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition expressing purpose; heads the PP.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Tu recueilles les signatures à l'entrée.

translations.fr: Tu recueilles les signatures à l'entrée.
translations.en: You're collecting the signatures at the entrance.
translations.es: Estás recogiendo las firmas en la entrada.
translations.de: Du sammelst die Unterschriften am Eingang.
translations.pt: Você está coletando as assinaturas na entrada.
translations.vi: Bạn đang thu thập chữ ký ở lối vào.
translations.nl: Je verzamelt de handtekeningen bij de ingang.
translations.hi: तुम प्रवेश द्वार पर हस्ताक्षर इकट्ठा कर रहे हो।
translations.nb: Du samler inn underskrifter ved inngangen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengumpulkan tanda tangan di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Du samlar in underskrifter vid ingången.
translations.ja: 入口で署名を集めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; agrees with the verb.
Main verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; action of collecting.
Definite article, plural; determiner of the noun ‘signatures’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition indicating location; introduces the PP.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; agrees in gender/number with the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’.

sentences.target: On doit recueillir des fonds pour l'école.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁə.kœ.jiʁ de fɔ̃ puʁ le.kɔl/

translations.fr: On doit recueillir des fonds pour l'école.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁə.kœ.jiʁ de fɔ̃ puʁ le.kɔl/
translations.en: We need to collect funds for the school.
translations.es: Necesitamos recaudar fondos para la escuela.
translations.de: Wir müssen Geld für die Schule sammeln.
translations.it: Dobbiamo raccogliere fondi per la scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要为学校筹集资金。
translations.ru: Нам нужно собрать средства для школы.
translations.pt: Precisamos arrecadar fundos para a escola.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לגייס כספים לבית הספר.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần gây quỹ cho trường.
translations.nl: We moeten geld inzamelen voor de school.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно зібрати кошти для школи.
translations.hi: हमें स्कूल के लिए धन जुटाने की ज़रूरत है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να συγκεντρώσουμε χρήματα για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Vi må samle inn penger til skolen.
translations.id: Kita perlu menggalang dana untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: Vi behöver samla in pengar till skolan.
translations.ro: Trebuie să strângem fonduri pentru școală.
translations.da: Vi skal samle penge ind til skolen.
translations.ja: 学校のために資金を集める必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often used as ‘we’); 3rd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; expresses obligation.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal ‘doit’.
Indefinite plural article; introduces ‘fonds’.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of ‘recueillir’.
Preposition expressing purpose; heads the PP.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; determiner of ‘école’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Nous recueillons des informations pour le rapport.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁə.kœ.jɔ̃ dez ɛ̃.fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ puʁ lə ʁa.pɔʁ/

translations.fr: Nous recueillons des informations pour le rapport.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁə.kœ.jɔ̃ dez ɛ̃.fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ puʁ lə ʁa.pɔʁ/
translations.en: We are gathering information for the report.
translations.es: Estamos recopilando información para el informe.
translations.de: Wir sammeln Informationen für den Bericht.
translations.it: Stiamo raccogliendo informazioni per il rapporto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为报告收集信息。
translations.yue: 我哋而家為報告收集資料。
translations.pt: Estamos coletando informações para o relatório.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang thu thập thông tin cho báo cáo.
translations.nl: We verzamelen informatie voor het rapport.
translations.hi: हम रिपोर्ट के लिए जानकारी एकत्र कर रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi samler inn informasjon til rapporten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengumpulkan informasi untuk laporan.
translations.sv: Vi samlar in information till rapporten.
translations.ja: 報告書のために情報を集めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; agrees with the verb.

Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.
